parameters.sqlQuery:
-- ============================================================
-- CALIDAD DE OFERTA — configuración dinámica vía CONTAINERS_FECHAS_EVENTOS
-- Produce 4 arrays: exhibidos_pattern, exhibidos_container,
--                   visitados_pattern, visitados_container
-- ============================================================

WITH

DATES AS (
  SELECT
    '%MKP DEMAND 5 5%' AS pattern,
    DATE '2026-04-20'  AS start_date,
    DATE '2026-05-05'  AS end_date
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- EXHIBITED CTEs  (compartidos para Q1 y Q2)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS   AS ITEM_ID,
    DATE(C.DATE)         AS DATE_EVENT,
    d.pattern            AS PATTERN,
    C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    C.CONTAINER_NAME
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` C
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(C.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(C.DATE) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  JOIN `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.MKP_SM_CONTAINERS_ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS` IE
    ON IE.DATE = C.DATE
   AND CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, r'MLA(\d+)-') AS INT64) = IE.CON_CONTAINER_ID
  WHERE C.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(C.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
    AND IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS IS NOT NULL
),

RIU_E AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) AS PHOTO_DATE,
    r.ITE_ITEM_ID,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_BENEFITS_RIU_CLUSTER_RESULTS` r
  JOIN ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS i
    ON r.ITE_ITEM_ID = i.ITEM_ID
   AND DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) = DATE_SUB(i.DATE_EVENT, INTERVAL 2 DAY)
  WHERE r.SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
),

OFFERS_E AS (
  SELECT
    o.DAY, o.ITE_ITEM_ID, o.FINAL_PRICE,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP, o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    REAL_OFFER_L30D AS REAL_OFFER
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.BENEFITS_OFFERS` o
  JOIN ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS i
    ON i.ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
   AND o.DAY = i.DATE_EVENT
  GROUP BY ALL
),

BASE_EXHIBIDOS AS (
  SELECT
    ie.PATTERN,
    ie.CONTAINER_NAME,
    SPLIT(ie.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    ie.ITEM_ID,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP,
    o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    o.REAL_OFFER,
    o.FINAL_PRICE
  FROM ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS ie
  LEFT JOIN RIU_E r
    ON ie.DATE_EVENT - 2 = r.PHOTO_DATE
   AND ie.ITEM_ID = r.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN OFFERS_E o
    ON ie.DATE_EVENT = o.DAY
   AND ie.ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- VISITED CTEs  (compartidos para Q3 y Q4)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

FILTRO_V AS (
  SELECT CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  FROM (
    SELECT
      SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
      SUM(UNIQUE_SESSION) AS SESSIONS
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` t
    JOIN DATES d ON LOWER(t.container_name) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
    WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
      AND DATE(t.date_event) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
    GROUP BY ALL
  ) WHERE SESSIONS > 1
),

CONTAINER_METRICS AS (
  SELECT
    SPLIT(t.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.C_UNIQUE_SESSION,0))   AS SESSIONS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.TRANSACTION_24HS,0))   AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.TRANSACTION_168HS,0))  AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.GMV_LC_24HS,0))        AS GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.GMV_LC_168HS,0))       AS GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.VPP_VIEWS,0))          AS VPP_VIEWS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.CONTAINER_VIEWS,0))    AS CONTAINER_VIEWS_TOTAL
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` t
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(t.DATE) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
  GROUP BY 1
),

ITEMS_V AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    t.VIEWED_ITEM_ID,
    DATE(t.DATE_EVENT)   AS DATE_EVENT,
    d.pattern            AS PATTERN,
    t.CONTAINER_NAME,
    SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` t
  JOIN FILTRO_V f ON SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] = f.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(t.DATE_EVENT) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
),

RIU_V AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) AS PHOTO_DATE,
    r.ITE_ITEM_ID,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_BENEFITS_RIU_CLUSTER_RESULTS` r
  JOIN ITEMS_V i
    ON r.ITE_ITEM_ID = i.VIEWED_ITEM_ID
   AND DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) = DATE_SUB(i.DATE_EVENT, INTERVAL 2 DAY)
  WHERE r.SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
),

OFFERS_V AS (
  SELECT
    o.DAY, o.ITE_ITEM_ID, o.FINAL_PRICE,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP, o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    REAL_OFFER_L30D AS REAL_OFFER,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(o.FINAL_PRICE, o.INITIAL_PRICE) - 1 AS pct_descuento
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.BENEFITS_OFFERS` o
  JOIN ITEMS_V i
    ON i.VIEWED_ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
   AND o.DAY = i.DATE_EVENT
  GROUP BY ALL
),

BASE_TABLE AS (
  SELECT
    d.pattern                                          AS PATTERN,
    a.CONTAINER_NAME,
    SPLIT(a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)]         AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP,
    o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    o.REAL_OFFER,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED,
    COALESCE(a.UNIQUE_SESSION,0) * COALESCE(o.pct_descuento,0) AS DESC_PRC_SESSION,
    COALESCE(a.UNIQUE_SESSION,0) * COALESCE(o.FINAL_PRICE,0)   AS FINAL_PRICE_SESSION,
    SUM(COALESCE(a.UNIQUE_SESSION,0)) AS UNIQUE_SESSION,
    SUM(COALESCE(a.GMV_24HS,0))       AS GMV_24HS
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` a
  JOIN FILTRO_V f ON SPLIT(a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] = f.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(a.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(a.DATE_EVENT) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  LEFT JOIN RIU_V r
    ON DATE(a.DATE_EVENT) - 2 = r.PHOTO_DATE
   AND a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID = r.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN OFFERS_V o
    ON DATE(a.DATE_EVENT) = o.DAY
   AND a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
  WHERE a.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(a.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
  GROUP BY ALL
),

-- Totales por PATTERN para Q4
TOTAL_VIEW_P AS (
  SELECT d.pattern, COUNT(DISTINCT t.VIEWED_ITEM_ID) AS TOTAL_VIEWED
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` t
  JOIN FILTRO_V f ON SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] = f.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(t.DATE_EVENT) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
  GROUP BY d.pattern
),

CONTAINERS_DIA AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT PATTERN, CONTAINER_DEAL_ID FROM BASE_TABLE
),

TOTALES_PATTERN AS (
  SELECT c.PATTERN,
    SUM(m.SESSIONS_TOTAL)           AS SESSIONS_TOTAL,
    SUM(m.TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL)  AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(m.TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL) AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL
  FROM CONTAINERS_DIA c
  JOIN CONTAINER_METRICS m ON m.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID = c.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  GROUP BY c.PATTERN
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Q1: Exhibidos por PATTERN
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

EXHIBIDOS_PATTERN AS (
  SELECT
    PATTERN,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID)                                                              AS ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(REAL_OFFER > 0, ITEM_ID, NULL))                                   AS REAL_OFFER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Boost','High','Mid high'), ITEM_ID, NULL)) AS HIGH_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Mid','Mid Low'), ITEM_ID, NULL))           AS MID_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Low','Out','Null') OR CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, ITEM_ID, NULL)) AS LOW_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, ITEM_ID, NULL))                        AS NULL_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_GROUP = 'Cofinanciadas', ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFINANCED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_GROUP = '100% Seller',   ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SELLER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'PRENEGOTIATED', ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'COFUNDED',      ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFUNDED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'TIERS',         ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_TIERS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'CUSTOM',        ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_CUSTOM,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'DOD',           ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_DOD,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'SMART',         ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SMART,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'LIGHTNING',     ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_LIGHTNING,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'OTHERS',        ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_OTHERS,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(FINAL_PRICE), COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID))                 AS PRICE_POND
  FROM BASE_EXHIBIDOS
  GROUP BY PATTERN
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Q4: Visitados por PATTERN
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

VISITADOS_PATTERN AS (
  SELECT
    a.PATTERN,
    tv.TOTAL_VIEWED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.REAL_OFFER > 0, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                              AS REAL_OFFER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                                AS GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Boost','High','Mid high'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                             AS HIGH_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Mid','Mid Low'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                       AS MID_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Low','Out','Null') OR a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                     AS LOW_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                    AS NULL_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                       AS NO_OFFER_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Boost','High','Mid high'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                         AS HIGH_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Mid','Mid Low'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                   AS MID_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND (a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Low','Out','Null') OR a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL)) AS LOW_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                AS NULL_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                   AS NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.REAL_OFFER > 0, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                          AS REAL_OFFER_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = 'Cofinanciadas', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFINANCED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = '100% Seller',   a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SELLER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'PRENEGOTIATED', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'TIERS',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_TIERS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'CUSTOM',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_CUSTOM,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'DOD',           a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_DOD,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'SMART',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SMART,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'LIGHTNING',     a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_LIGHTNING,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'OTHERS',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_OTHERS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = 'Cofinanciadas', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = '100% Seller',   a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SELLER_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'PRENEGOTIATED', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'TIERS',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_TIERS_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'CUSTOM',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'DOD',           a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_DOD_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'SMART',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SMART_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'LIGHTNING',     a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'OTHERS',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_OTHERS_GMV,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(a.FINAL_PRICE_SESSION), SUM(a.UNIQUE_SESSION)) AS PRICE_POND,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(a.DESC_PRC_SESSION),    SUM(a.UNIQUE_SESSION)) AS DISCOUNT_POND,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID) AS VIEWED_ITEMS,
    SUM(a.UNIQUE_SESSION)            AS SESSIONS_ITEMS,
    tp.SESSIONS_TOTAL                AS UNIQUE_SESSION,
    tp.TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL       AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS,
    tp.TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL      AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS
  FROM BASE_TABLE a
  LEFT JOIN TOTAL_VIEW_P  tv ON tv.pattern   = a.PATTERN
  LEFT JOIN TOTALES_PATTERN tp ON tp.PATTERN = a.PATTERN
  GROUP BY
    a.PATTERN, tv.TOTAL_VIEWED,
    tp.SESSIONS_TOTAL, tp.TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL, tp.TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- JOIN final: exhibidos + visitados por PATTERN y CONTAINER
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

OFERTA_JOINED AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ep.PATTERN, vp.PATTERN)         AS PATTERN,
    -- E step
    COALESCE(ep.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS, 0)          AS ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS,
    COALESCE(ep.REAL_OFFER, 0)               AS REAL_OFFER_E,
    COALESCE(ep.HIGH_ITEMS, 0)               AS HIGH_ITEMS_E,
    COALESCE(ep.MID_ITEMS, 0)                AS MID_ITEMS_E,
    COALESCE(ep.LOW_ITEMS, 0)                AS LOW_ITEMS_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_COFINANCED, 0)         AS OFFER_COFINANCED_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_SELLER, 0)             AS OFFER_SELLER_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED, 0)      AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_COFUNDED, 0)           AS OFFER_COFUNDED_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_TIERS, 0)              AS OFFER_TIERS_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_CUSTOM, 0)             AS OFFER_CUSTOM_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_DOD, 0)               AS OFFER_DOD_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_SMART, 0)              AS OFFER_SMART_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_LIGHTNING, 0)          AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_E,
    COALESCE(ep.OFFER_OTHERS, 0)             AS OFFER_OTHERS_E,
    -- V step
    COALESCE(vp.TOTAL_VIEWED, 0)             AS TOTAL_VIEWED,
    COALESCE(vp.VIEWED_ITEMS, 0)             AS VIEWED_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.REAL_OFFER, 0)               AS REAL_OFFER_V,
    COALESCE(vp.HIGH_ITEMS, 0)               AS HIGH_ITEMS_V,
    COALESCE(vp.MID_ITEMS, 0)                AS MID_ITEMS_V,
    COALESCE(vp.LOW_ITEMS, 0)                AS LOW_ITEMS_V,
    COALESCE(vp.NO_OFFER_ITEMS, 0)           AS NO_OFFER_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_COFINANCED, 0)         AS OFFER_COFINANCED_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_SELLER, 0)             AS OFFER_SELLER_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED, 0)      AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_TIERS, 0)              AS OFFER_TIERS_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_CUSTOM, 0)             AS OFFER_CUSTOM_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_DOD, 0)               AS OFFER_DOD_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_SMART, 0)              AS OFFER_SMART_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_LIGHTNING, 0)          AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_V,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_OTHERS, 0)             AS OFFER_OTHERS_V,
    -- G step
    COALESCE(vp.GMV_ITEMS, 0)                AS GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.REAL_OFFER_GMV, 0)           AS REAL_OFFER_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.HIGH_GMV_ITEMS, 0)           AS HIGH_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.MID_GMV_ITEMS, 0)            AS MID_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.LOW_GMV_ITEMS, 0)            AS LOW_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS, 0)       AS NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV, 0)     AS OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_SELLER_GMV, 0)         AS OFFER_SELLER_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV, 0)  AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_TIERS_GMV, 0)          AS OFFER_TIERS_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV, 0)         AS OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_DOD_GMV, 0)           AS OFFER_DOD_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_SMART_GMV, 0)          AS OFFER_SMART_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV, 0)      AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV,
    COALESCE(vp.OFFER_OTHERS_GMV, 0)         AS OFFER_OTHERS_GMV,
    -- Métricas de sesión
    vp.DISCOUNT_POND,
    COALESCE(vp.UNIQUE_SESSION, 0)           AS UNIQUE_SESSION,
    COALESCE(vp.TRANSACTIONS_24HS, 0)        AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS,
    COALESCE(vp.TRANSACTIONS_168HS, 0)       AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS
  FROM EXHIBIDOS_PATTERN ep
  FULL OUTER JOIN VISITADOS_PATTERN vp ON ep.PATTERN = vp.PATTERN
)


SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"oferta":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      PATTERN,
      ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS, REAL_OFFER_E, HIGH_ITEMS_E, MID_ITEMS_E, LOW_ITEMS_E,
      OFFER_COFINANCED_E, OFFER_SELLER_E, OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_E, OFFER_COFUNDED_E,
      OFFER_TIERS_E, OFFER_CUSTOM_E, OFFER_DOD_E, OFFER_SMART_E, OFFER_LIGHTNING_E, OFFER_OTHERS_E,
      TOTAL_VIEWED, VIEWED_ITEMS, REAL_OFFER_V, HIGH_ITEMS_V, MID_ITEMS_V, LOW_ITEMS_V,
      NO_OFFER_ITEMS, OFFER_COFINANCED_V, OFFER_SELLER_V, OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_V,
      OFFER_TIERS_V, OFFER_CUSTOM_V, OFFER_DOD_V, OFFER_SMART_V, OFFER_LIGHTNING_V, OFFER_OTHERS_V,
      GMV_ITEMS, REAL_OFFER_GMV, HIGH_GMV_ITEMS, MID_GMV_ITEMS, LOW_GMV_ITEMS, NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS,
      OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV, OFFER_SELLER_GMV, OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV,
      OFFER_TIERS_GMV, OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV, OFFER_DOD_GMV, OFFER_SMART_GMV, OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV, OFFER_OTHERS_GMV,
      DISCOUNT_POND, UNIQUE_SESSION, TRANSACTIONS_24HS, TRANSACTIONS_168HS
    ))) FROM OFERTA_JOINED),
    ',"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64

-- ============================================================
-- CALIDAD DE OFERTA — configuración dinámica vía CONTAINERS_FECHAS_EVENTOS
-- Produce 4 arrays: exhibidos_pattern, exhibidos_container,
--                   visitados_pattern, visitados_container
-- ============================================================

WITH

DATES AS (
  SELECT
    '%MKP DEMAND 5 5%' AS pattern,
    DATE '2026-04-20'  AS start_date,
    DATE '2026-05-05'  AS end_date
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- EXHIBITED CTEs  (compartidos para Q1 y Q2)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS   AS ITEM_ID,
    DATE(C.DATE)         AS DATE_EVENT,
    d.pattern            AS PATTERN,
    C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    C.CONTAINER_NAME
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` C
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(C.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(C.DATE) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  JOIN `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.MKP_SM_CONTAINERS_ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS` IE
    ON IE.DATE = C.DATE
   AND CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, r'MLA(\d+)-') AS INT64) = IE.CON_CONTAINER_ID
  WHERE C.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(C.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
    AND IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS IS NOT NULL
),

RIU_E AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) AS PHOTO_DATE,
    r.ITE_ITEM_ID,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_BENEFITS_RIU_CLUSTER_RESULTS` r
  JOIN ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS i
    ON r.ITE_ITEM_ID = i.ITEM_ID
   AND DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) = DATE_SUB(i.DATE_EVENT, INTERVAL 2 DAY)
  WHERE r.SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
),

OFFERS_E AS (
  SELECT
    o.DAY, o.ITE_ITEM_ID, o.FINAL_PRICE,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP, o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    REAL_OFFER_L30D AS REAL_OFFER
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.BENEFITS_OFFERS` o
  JOIN ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS i
    ON i.ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
   AND o.DAY = i.DATE_EVENT
  GROUP BY ALL
),

BASE_EXHIBIDOS AS (
  SELECT
    ie.PATTERN,
    ie.CONTAINER_NAME,
    SPLIT(ie.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    ie.ITEM_ID,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP,
    o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    o.REAL_OFFER,
    o.FINAL_PRICE
  FROM ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS ie
  LEFT JOIN RIU_E r
    ON ie.DATE_EVENT - 2 = r.PHOTO_DATE
   AND ie.ITEM_ID = r.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN OFFERS_E o
    ON ie.DATE_EVENT = o.DAY
   AND ie.ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- VISITED CTEs  (compartidos para Q3 y Q4)
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

FILTRO_V AS (
  SELECT CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  FROM (
    SELECT
      SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
      SUM(UNIQUE_SESSION) AS SESSIONS
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` t
    JOIN DATES d ON LOWER(t.container_name) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
    WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
      AND DATE(t.date_event) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
    GROUP BY ALL
  ) WHERE SESSIONS > 1
),

CONTAINER_METRICS AS (
  SELECT
    SPLIT(t.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.C_UNIQUE_SESSION,0))   AS SESSIONS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.TRANSACTION_24HS,0))   AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.TRANSACTION_168HS,0))  AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.GMV_LC_24HS,0))        AS GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.GMV_LC_168HS,0))       AS GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.VPP_VIEWS,0))          AS VPP_VIEWS_TOTAL,
    SUM(COALESCE(t.CONTAINER_VIEWS,0))    AS CONTAINER_VIEWS_TOTAL
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` t
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(t.DATE) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
  GROUP BY 1
),

ITEMS_V AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    t.VIEWED_ITEM_ID,
    DATE(t.DATE_EVENT)   AS DATE_EVENT,
    d.pattern            AS PATTERN,
    t.CONTAINER_NAME,
    SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` t
  JOIN FILTRO_V f ON SPLIT(t.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] = f.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(t.DATE_EVENT) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(t.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
),

RIU_V AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) AS PHOTO_DATE,
    r.ITE_ITEM_ID,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_BENEFITS_RIU_CLUSTER_RESULTS` r
  JOIN ITEMS_V i
    ON r.ITE_ITEM_ID = i.VIEWED_ITEM_ID
   AND DATE(DATE_TRUNC(r.PHOTO_ID, DAY)) = DATE_SUB(i.DATE_EVENT, INTERVAL 2 DAY)
  WHERE r.SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
),

OFFERS_V AS (
  SELECT
    o.DAY, o.ITE_ITEM_ID, o.FINAL_PRICE,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP, o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    REAL_OFFER_L30D AS REAL_OFFER,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(o.FINAL_PRICE, o.INITIAL_PRICE) - 1 AS pct_descuento
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.BENEFITS_OFFERS` o
  JOIN ITEMS_V i
    ON i.VIEWED_ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
   AND o.DAY = i.DATE_EVENT
  GROUP BY ALL
),

BASE_TABLE AS (
  SELECT
    d.pattern                                          AS PATTERN,
    a.CONTAINER_NAME,
    SPLIT(a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)]         AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID,
    o.CAMPAIGN_GROUP,
    o.CAMPAIGN_TYPE,
    o.REAL_OFFER,
    r.CATEGORY_VERIFIED,
    COALESCE(a.UNIQUE_SESSION,0) * COALESCE(o.pct_descuento,0) AS DESC_PRC_SESSION,
    COALESCE(a.UNIQUE_SESSION,0) * COALESCE(o.FINAL_PRICE,0)   AS FINAL_PRICE_SESSION,
    SUM(COALESCE(a.UNIQUE_SESSION,0)) AS UNIQUE_SESSION,
    SUM(COALESCE(a.GMV_24HS,0))       AS GMV_24HS
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER` a
  JOIN FILTRO_V f ON SPLIT(a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, '-')[OFFSET(0)] = f.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
  JOIN DATES d
    ON LOWER(a.CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE LOWER(d.pattern)
   AND DATE(a.DATE_EVENT) BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  LEFT JOIN RIU_V r
    ON DATE(a.DATE_EVENT) - 2 = r.PHOTO_DATE
   AND a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID = r.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN OFFERS_V o
    ON DATE(a.DATE_EVENT) = o.DAY
   AND a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID = o.ITE_ITEM_ID
  WHERE a.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND LOWER(a.CONTAINER_NAME) NOT LIKE '%ads%'
  GROUP BY ALL
),

-- Q2: Exhibidos por CONTAINER
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

EXHIBIDOS_CONTAINER AS (
  SELECT
    CONTAINER_NAME,
    CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID)                                                              AS ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(REAL_OFFER > 0, ITEM_ID, NULL))                                   AS REAL_OFFER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Boost','High','Mid high'), ITEM_ID, NULL)) AS HIGH_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Mid','Mid Low'), ITEM_ID, NULL))           AS MID_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Low','Out','Null') OR CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, ITEM_ID, NULL)) AS LOW_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, ITEM_ID, NULL))                        AS NULL_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_GROUP = 'Cofinanciadas', ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFINANCED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_GROUP = '100% Seller',   ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SELLER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'PRENEGOTIATED', ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'COFUNDED',      ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFUNDED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'TIERS',         ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_TIERS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'CUSTOM',        ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_CUSTOM,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'DOD',           ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_DOD,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'SMART',         ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SMART,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'LIGHTNING',     ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_LIGHTNING,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'OTHERS',        ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_OTHERS,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(FINAL_PRICE), COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID))                 AS PRICE_POND
  FROM BASE_EXHIBIDOS
  GROUP BY CONTAINER_NAME, CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Q3: Visitados por CONTAINER
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════

VISITADOS_CONTAINER AS (
  SELECT
    a.CONTAINER_NAME,
    a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.REAL_OFFER > 0, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                              AS REAL_OFFER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                                AS GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Boost','High','Mid high'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                             AS HIGH_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Mid','Mid Low'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                       AS MID_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Low','Out','Null') OR a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                     AS LOW_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                    AS NULL_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                                       AS NO_OFFER_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Boost','High','Mid high'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                         AS HIGH_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Mid','Mid Low'), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                   AS MID_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND (a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IN ('Low','Out','Null') OR a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL), a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL)) AS LOW_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CATEGORY_VERIFIED IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                AS NULL_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP IS NULL, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                   AS NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.REAL_OFFER > 0, a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))                                                          AS REAL_OFFER_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = 'Cofinanciadas', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFINANCED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = '100% Seller',   a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SELLER,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'PRENEGOTIATED', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'COFUNDED',      a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFUNDED,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'TIERS',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_TIERS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'CUSTOM',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_CUSTOM,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'DOD',           a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_DOD,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'SMART',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SMART,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'LIGHTNING',     a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_LIGHTNING,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'OTHERS',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_OTHERS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = 'Cofinanciadas', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_GROUP = '100% Seller',   a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SELLER_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'PRENEGOTIATED', a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'COFUNDED',      a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_COFUNDED_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'TIERS',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_TIERS_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'CUSTOM',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'DOD',           a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_DOD_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'SMART',         a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_SMART_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'LIGHTNING',     a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(a.GMV_24HS > 0 AND a.CAMPAIGN_TYPE  = 'OTHERS',        a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID, NULL))   AS OFFER_OTHERS_GMV,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(a.FINAL_PRICE_SESSION), SUM(a.UNIQUE_SESSION)) AS PRICE_POND,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(a.DESC_PRC_SESSION),    SUM(a.UNIQUE_SESSION)) AS DISCOUNT_POND,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.VIEWED_ITEM_ID) AS VIEWED_ITEMS,
    SUM(a.UNIQUE_SESSION)            AS SESSIONS_ITEMS,
    cm.SESSIONS_TOTAL                AS UNIQUE_SESSION,
    cm.TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL       AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS,
    cm.TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL      AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS,
    cm.GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL,
    cm.GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL,
    cm.VPP_VIEWS_TOTAL,
    cm.CONTAINER_VIEWS_TOTAL
  FROM BASE_TABLE a
  LEFT JOIN CONTAINER_METRICS cm ON a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID = cm.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
  GROUP BY
    a.CONTAINER_NAME, a.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    cm.SESSIONS_TOTAL, cm.TRANSACTIONS_24HS_TOTAL, cm.TRANSACTIONS_168HS_TOTAL,
    cm.GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL, cm.GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL, cm.VPP_VIEWS_TOTAL, cm.CONTAINER_VIEWS_TOTAL
),

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
CONTAINERS_JOINED AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ec.CONTAINER_NAME,    vc.CONTAINER_NAME)    AS CONTAINER_NAME,
    COALESCE(ec.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID, vc.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID) AS CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
    -- E step
    COALESCE(ec.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS, 0)          AS ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS,
    COALESCE(ec.REAL_OFFER, 0)               AS REAL_OFFER_E,
    COALESCE(ec.HIGH_ITEMS, 0)               AS HIGH_ITEMS_E,
    COALESCE(ec.MID_ITEMS, 0)                AS MID_ITEMS_E,
    COALESCE(ec.LOW_ITEMS, 0)                AS LOW_ITEMS_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_COFINANCED, 0)         AS OFFER_COFINANCED_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_SELLER, 0)             AS OFFER_SELLER_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED, 0)      AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_COFUNDED, 0)           AS OFFER_COFUNDED_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_TIERS, 0)              AS OFFER_TIERS_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_CUSTOM, 0)             AS OFFER_CUSTOM_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_DOD, 0)               AS OFFER_DOD_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_SMART, 0)              AS OFFER_SMART_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_LIGHTNING, 0)          AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_E,
    COALESCE(ec.OFFER_OTHERS, 0)             AS OFFER_OTHERS_E,
    -- V step
    COALESCE(vc.VIEWED_ITEMS, 0)             AS VIEWED_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.REAL_OFFER, 0)               AS REAL_OFFER_V,
    COALESCE(vc.HIGH_ITEMS, 0)               AS HIGH_ITEMS_V,
    COALESCE(vc.MID_ITEMS, 0)                AS MID_ITEMS_V,
    COALESCE(vc.LOW_ITEMS, 0)                AS LOW_ITEMS_V,
    COALESCE(vc.NO_OFFER_ITEMS, 0)           AS NO_OFFER_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_COFINANCED, 0)         AS OFFER_COFINANCED_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_SELLER, 0)             AS OFFER_SELLER_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED, 0)      AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_COFUNDED, 0)           AS OFFER_COFUNDED_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_TIERS, 0)              AS OFFER_TIERS_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_CUSTOM, 0)             AS OFFER_CUSTOM_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_DOD, 0)               AS OFFER_DOD_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_SMART, 0)              AS OFFER_SMART_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_LIGHTNING, 0)          AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_V,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_OTHERS, 0)             AS OFFER_OTHERS_V,
    -- G step
    COALESCE(vc.GMV_ITEMS, 0)                AS GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.REAL_OFFER_GMV, 0)           AS REAL_OFFER_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.HIGH_GMV_ITEMS, 0)           AS HIGH_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.MID_GMV_ITEMS, 0)            AS MID_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.LOW_GMV_ITEMS, 0)            AS LOW_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS, 0)       AS NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV, 0)     AS OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_SELLER_GMV, 0)         AS OFFER_SELLER_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV, 0)  AS OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_COFUNDED_GMV, 0)       AS OFFER_COFUNDED_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_TIERS_GMV, 0)          AS OFFER_TIERS_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV, 0)         AS OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_DOD_GMV, 0)           AS OFFER_DOD_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_SMART_GMV, 0)          AS OFFER_SMART_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV, 0)      AS OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV,
    COALESCE(vc.OFFER_OTHERS_GMV, 0)         AS OFFER_OTHERS_GMV,
    -- Métricas de sesión y NMV
    vc.DISCOUNT_POND,
    COALESCE(vc.UNIQUE_SESSION, 0)           AS UNIQUE_SESSION,
    COALESCE(vc.TRANSACTIONS_24HS, 0)        AS TRANSACTIONS_24HS,
    COALESCE(vc.TRANSACTIONS_168HS, 0)       AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS,
    COALESCE(vc.GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL, 0)        AS GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL,
    COALESCE(vc.GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL, 0)       AS GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL,
    COALESCE(vc.SESSIONS_ITEMS, 0)           AS SESSIONS_ITEMS
  FROM EXHIBIDOS_CONTAINER ec
  FULL OUTER JOIN VISITADOS_CONTAINER vc ON ec.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID = vc.CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
)


SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"containers":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      CONTAINER_NAME, CONTAINER_DEAL_ID,
      ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS, REAL_OFFER_E, HIGH_ITEMS_E, MID_ITEMS_E, LOW_ITEMS_E,
      OFFER_COFINANCED_E, OFFER_SELLER_E, OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_E, OFFER_COFUNDED_E,
      OFFER_TIERS_E, OFFER_CUSTOM_E, OFFER_DOD_E, OFFER_SMART_E, OFFER_LIGHTNING_E, OFFER_OTHERS_E,
      VIEWED_ITEMS, REAL_OFFER_V, HIGH_ITEMS_V, MID_ITEMS_V, LOW_ITEMS_V,
      NO_OFFER_ITEMS, OFFER_COFINANCED_V, OFFER_SELLER_V, OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_V, OFFER_COFUNDED_V,
      OFFER_TIERS_V, OFFER_CUSTOM_V, OFFER_DOD_V, OFFER_SMART_V, OFFER_LIGHTNING_V, OFFER_OTHERS_V,
      GMV_ITEMS, REAL_OFFER_GMV, HIGH_GMV_ITEMS, MID_GMV_ITEMS, LOW_GMV_ITEMS, NO_OFFER_GMV_ITEMS,
      OFFER_COFINANCED_GMV, OFFER_SELLER_GMV, OFFER_PRENEGOTIATED_GMV, OFFER_COFUNDED_GMV,
      OFFER_TIERS_GMV, OFFER_CUSTOM_GMV, OFFER_DOD_GMV, OFFER_SMART_GMV, OFFER_LIGHTNING_GMV, OFFER_OTHERS_GMV,
      DISCOUNT_POND, UNIQUE_SESSION, TRANSACTIONS_24HS, TRANSACTIONS_168HS,
      GMV_LC_24HS_TOTAL, GMV_LC_168HS_TOTAL, SESSIONS_ITEMS
    ))) FROM CONTAINERS_JOINED),
    ',"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
